gist.headline: The SDK gets a paintbrush
gist.blurb: We've added image editing support to the SDK. Now you can programmatically tweak, remix, and repaint your images with a single function call.
gist.summary: Added `imageEdit()` and `editImage()` methods to the TypeScript SDK to support the OpenAI-compatible image editing endpoint.
gist.impact: Developers can now programmatically edit images using prompts and source URLs directly through the SDK, complete with handy file-saving helpers.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot acting as a painter or editor. She should be holding a tiny pixelated paintbrush or palette, standing next to a canvas or a glowing retro monitor showing a half-painted image. The monitor robot could be watching excitedly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a small paintbrush and touching up a digital canvas on an easel. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
